issue: Hardcoded IP address in API_BASE_URL prevents deployment flexibility and exposes internal network structure
recommendation: Use environment variable: const API_BASE_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || '/api'

issue: Hardcoded API URL with IP address in fetch call instead of using centralized api client
recommendation: Import and use the centralized api client from '../api' or use environment-configured base URL

issue: Hardcoded API_URL constant with internal IP address
recommendation: Use environment variable: const API_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || '/api'

issue: Hardcoded API_URL constant with internal IP address
recommendation: Use environment variable: const API_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || '/api'

issue: Hardcoded IP in createSetupSession fetch call
recommendation: Use environment variable: process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || '/api'

issue: Hardcoded IP in router discovery fetch call
recommendation: Use environment variable for API base URL

issue: Hardcoded IP in credentials submission fetch call
recommendation: Use environment variable for API base URL

issue: Hardcoded IP in device scan fetch call
recommendation: Use environment variable for API base URL

issue: Hardcoded IP in devices fetch call
recommendation: Use environment variable for API base URL

issue: Fallback hardcoded IP address in setup status check
recommendation: Use relative URL '/api/setup/status' or environment variable

issue: LocalStorage used to persist setup data potentially containing sensitive router credentials
recommendation: Remove localStorage persistence for credential data or use sessionStorage and clear on completion

issue: event.details rendered directly without sanitization, potential XSS if backend data is compromised
recommendation: Sanitize content before rendering or use a library like DOMPurify for user-generated content

issue: alert.description and alert.narrative rendered directly without sanitization
recommendation: Sanitize content before rendering to prevent XSS

issue: alert.narrative and alert.description rendered without sanitization
recommendation: Sanitize content before rendering to prevent XSS

issue: No CSRF protection implemented in API client
recommendation: Add CSRF token header to all requests or implement cookie-based protection

issue: Polling interval creates unnecessary network requests and potential memory leak if component unmounts during fetch
recommendation: Add AbortController to fetch or switch to WebSockets for real-time updates

issue: 10-second polling interval is aggressive and creates unnecessary load
recommendation: Implement exponential backoff or switch to Server-Sent Events/WebSockets

issue: 30-second polling interval may miss important state changes
recommendation: Consider WebSocket connection for real-time agent status updates

issue: filteredData recomputed on every render without memoization
recommendation: Use useMemo: const filteredData = useMemo(() => accessData.filter(...), [accessData])

issue: fetchEvents dependency array includes filters object which causes effect to run on every render if filters is a new object
recommendation: Stringify filters for comparison or use individual filter properties in dependency array

issue: Clickable div without keyboard accessibility - not reachable via Tab key
recommendation: Change to button element or add tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown handler, and appropriate ARIA attributes

issue: Form inputs lack proper aria-describedby associations for helper text
recommendation: Add id to small elements and aria-describedby to inputs linking to them

issue: Acknowledge error only logged to console, user not notified of failure
recommendation: Add user-visible error notification when acknowledge fails

issue: Acknowledge all error only logged to console
recommendation: Add user-visible error notification

issue: Fetch error swallowed, user sees empty state instead of error message
recommendation: Display error state to user when device fetch fails

issue: Error state stored but never displayed to users
recommendation: Add error UI to show when event fetch fails

issue: Global CSS without CSS Modules or scoping - risk of naming collisions
recommendation: Migrate to CSS Modules, styled-components, or Tailwind CSS

issue: Mixed usage of axios and native fetch creates inconsistency
recommendation: Standardize on axios (already configured) and update all components to use api client

issue: File exceeds 600 lines - violates single responsibility principle
recommendation: Split into smaller components: WizardContainer, StepRenderer, and individual step components

issue: No request/response interceptors for error handling or auth token injection
recommendation: Add axios interceptors for centralized error handling and token management

issue: Container runs development server instead of production build
recommendation: Use multi-stage build: build with 'npm run build', serve static files with nginx or serve package

issue: No ESLint configuration beyond react-app defaults
recommendation: Add custom ESLint config with security and accessibility rules

issue: No test files or testing dependencies configured
recommendation: Add @testing-library/react and write tests for critical paths

issue: window.confirm blocks the main thread and creates inconsistent UI
recommendation: Use a custom modal component for confirmation dialogs

issue: PageWrapper creates 4 nearly identical wrapper components
recommendation: Use React Router Outlet pattern with a Layout component

issue: Router discovery tries HTTP endpoints which may trigger mixed content warnings in HTTPS deployments
recommendation: Use relative URLs or wss:// for secure contexts

issue: Slate-400 on slate-800 color combination may fail WCAG AA contrast requirements for small text
recommendation: Run contrast audit and adjust colors to meet WCAG AA standards
